name: GIGABYTE B850 GAMING WIFI6 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 3x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 1 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Realtek GbE LAN - 802.11ax Wi-Fi 6 - Bluetooth 5.3
shortName: GIGABYTE B850 GAMING WIFI6 ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0
description: Full-size ATX AM5 motherboard with PCIe 5.0, DDR5-8200 support, and Wi-Fi 6 for AM5 gaming builds.
